web_results.title: Next Supreme Leader of Iran election
web_results.description: Before Khamenei's death, no person had been officially declared as the heir to Khamenei nor as a nominee, though various sources such as Reuters and BBC News have reported on potential candidates. In 2014, it was reported that the succession of Khamenei is deemed to have been decided but not disclosed publicly.
